auth.responsibilities: Handles auth, session commands, API token legacy checks, OneSignal updates

matches.responsibilities: Manages sports matches creation and list queries

advice.responsibilities: Produces betting advice with deterministic mock selections

audit.responsibilities: Infrastructure and API for audit logs

outbox.responsibilities: Outbox event relaying and SQS queuing

shared.responsibilities: AWS clients, redis cache, postgres database, tenant isolation, health, exception filters, and core utils

violations: No runtime separation of API and Worker. A single bootstrap main.ts handles all traffic, background queues, and scheduled tasks simultaneously.
Lack of domain isolation: several infra files import third-party libraries directly or bypass domain abstractions.
Absence of required sports-specific modules (providers, odds, analysis, coupons, settlement).
